description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with multiple dormer windows, giving it a classic, storybook appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns and a stone base, leading to a prominent entryway. The structure is primarily composed of stone and wood, with large chimneys and a tall, narrow central section. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with the upper story featuring three dormers and the lower story having evenly spaced rectangular windows. The roof is clad in muted blue-gray shingles, while the walls are a light beige with dark trim. Architectural details such as the steep rooflines, dormers, and columned porch evoke a traditional, European-inspired residential style.
description: A two-story house with a steep gable roof, dormer windows, and a columned front porch on a stone base, featuring classic European-inspired design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, and central gable with a large window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall chimney, symmetrical dormer windows, and extended roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back gable and minimal window openings, with the roof dominating the silhouette.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the porch and the side chimney, as well as the arrangement of dormers and windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with covered porch, stone base, columns, and overhanging gable
